heroHeadline: Trump Extends US-Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely — IRGC Seizes Two Ships in Hormuz on Same Day
heroSubtitle: President Trump extended the expired US-Iran ceasefire indefinitely on April 22 at Pakistan's request, keeping the naval blockade in place and claiming Iran was 'collapsing financially.' Hours later, Iran's IRGC seized two container ships (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas) in the Strait and fired on three more, marking the sharpest maritime escalation since the blockade began. Virginia Democrats won a redistricting referendum 51.5%–48.6%, potentially flipping 8–10 House seats; the Supreme Court struck down IEEPA tariffs 6–3, triggering $166B in refunds.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
